response.justification: While Bogdan meets the educational baseline (Bachelor's CS + 14 years experience) and demonstrates strong systems-level thinking across multiple domains, the resume shows no evidence of the specialized expertise required: GPU architecture, SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator optimization, or deep learning frameworks. His background is primarily full-stack and web services with some low-level work in robotics and real-time systems. The domain gap between his actual experience and the role's hardware-optimization focus is too significant to justify proceeding without specialized AI accelerator experience.
strengths: 14+ years of professional experience at staff/principal level with demonstrated systems architecture expertise
Proven performance optimization mindset from low-latency microservices and real-time systems at Dunnhumby
Experience with low-level languages (C, C++, D Lang) and hardware-adjacent work (robotic arms, embedded systems)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with GPU architecture, AI accelerator optimization, or deep neural network workloads
Missing core required skills: SoC/IP modeling, SIMD/MIMD architecture design, and hardware-software co-design
Career trajectory is predominantly full-stack web/backend engineering rather than hardware performance architecture

key_factors.factor: AI accelerator and GPU architecture expertise
SoC/IP modeling and hardware design experience
Systems architecture maturity and low-level optimization experience
